issue.errorLine1:
<string name="privacy_policy_content">AudioLoop respects your privacy. All your audio recordings and notes are stored locally on your device or in your personal Google Drive account. We do not have access to your recordings. 

Permissions used: 
- Microphone: To record your audio. 
- Storage: To store and play your audio files. 
- Google Drive: To provide backup functionality (if enabled by you). 

Your data is yours. You can export or delete it at any time from the app settings.</string>
